headline: Assessing Agilent Technologies (A) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Agilent Technologies (A) has been drawing attention after recent share price weakness, with the stock down about 10% over the past month and 17% over the past 3 months. This has prompted fresh interest in its valuation. See our latest analysis for Agilent Technologies. That recent 10% 30 day share price decline and 17.5% 90 day share price decline come on top of a 7.7% 1 year total shareholder return loss. Momentum has clearly been fading despite the current US$112.75 share price. If you are...
